Description: Cindy is loathe to part with an autographed drumstick collection; a 1967 C10 Chevy pickup; 1988 Trans Am GTA.

Description: The 2025 Frogg Toggs Elite Solo Tour rolls into Port Arthur, TX, for West Division Tour Stop Three. Skill, patience, and precision will decide the top angler.

Description: Clive continues his adventure across Oman, following the Silk Road's ancient frankincense trail through rugged desert landscapes.

Subject: In the Eye of the Storm - Texas Derecho Disaster

Subject: In the Eye of the Storm - Terrifying Twin Twisters

Subject: In the Eye of the Storm - Nightmare Before Christmas

Subject: In the Eye of the Storm - Snowmageddon

Subject: Naked and Afraid - Hell or High Water

Subject: Naked and Afraid - The Hunted

Subject: Naked and Afraid - Burnt to a Crisp

Subject: Naked and Afraid - Not Today, Satan

Subject: Naked and Afraid - Sucker Punched in South Africa
Description: In this Tribes' episode, two men and a woman attempt to survive 21 days in the searing heat of Limpokwena, South Africa; after suffering from harsh burns and severe dehydration on Day 1, their will to endure is threatened.

Subject: Naked and Afraid - Bro, Hold My Fear
Description: Four male survivalists who tapped in previous challenges seek redemption in South Africa; humbled by their past failures, they hope to survive 21 days and triumph as a tribe.

Subject: Caught - Insane Attacks

Subject: Caught! - Nude, Crude, and Unscrewed

Subject: Caught! - Licensed to Thrill
Description: This week's comedy clips push boundaries and guarantee thrills -- no license is required, but buckle up for the ride.

Subject: Caught! - Leave It to the Professionals
Description: Amateurs attempt outrageous activities; hilarious stunts, spills, and thrills gone wrong showcase backyard engineering, clueless humans and uncooperative machinery.

Subject: Contraband: Seized at the Border - I'm Clean, Bro

Subject: Contraband: Seized at the Border - Wheels on the Bus

Description: An aerial tour over New Zealand showcases a diverse world of snow-capped mountains, active volcanoes, and a storied past.

Subject: Epic Yellowstone - Down the River Wild
Description: The Yellowstone River moves untamed through its 700-mile journey; trumpeter swans congregate; otters makes a daring portage down the cliffs; a grizzly sow fords rapids; fly fishermen take advantage of the swarm of salmon fly hatch.

Subject: Epic Yellowstone - Fire and Ice
Description: Stories of wintertime survival include the park's toughest inhabitants; a bobcat hunts for waterfowl; otters find fishing holes; bison migrate to Yellowstone's geothermal core; a look at the park's geysers and hot springs through thermal imagery.

Subject: Extreme Airport Africa - Flying Lions
Description: In the wilds of Southern Africa, aviation takes over where roads don't go. Extreme Airport Africa brings you into the world of high-octane, high-risk bush flying where pilots brave rough runways, wild fires and wild animals.

Subject: Extreme Airport Africa - Flying Grandmas
Description: A P51 Mustang takes a combat veteran back in time. A bush aviator flies a mission to save rhinos from extinction. Mechanics race to fit new engines on an air ambulance heading into a warzone, and a pilot takes control of a jet f.

Subject: Extreme Airport Africa - Flight For Life
Description: In the wilds of Southern Africa, aviation takes over where roads don't go. Extreme Airport Africa brings you into the world of high-octane, high-risk bush flying where pilots brave rough runways, wild fires and wild animals.

Subject: Extreme Airport Africa - Flight Of The Pangolin
Description: A bush airport fights fire with fire. Flying Namibian cowboys race against the heat to save antelope from drought. A father and son duo of mechanics tackle a test that could make or break their careers, and an endangered Pangoli.

Subject: Extreme Airport Africa - Flight For Life
Description: In the wilds of Southern Africa, aviation takes over where roads don't go. Extreme Airport Africa brings you into the world of high-octane, high-risk bush flying where pilots brave rough runways, wild fires and wild animals.

Subject: Extreme Airport Africa - Flight The Power
Description: A mid-air engine shutdown forces maintenance teams to scramble.?A helicopter pilot flies engineers onto live power lines. A rookie pilot flies his first solo anti-poaching patrol, and scientists fly to track down a pride of lion.

Subject: Extreme Airport Africa - Close Encounters Of The Bird Kind
Description: A skilled canine team tracks birds disrupting Africa's busiest airport. Mechanics race to fix a cargo hauler for the largest bush airline. Helicopter pilots meet ships near the Cape of Good Hope, while flying doctors deliver life-saving surgery.

Subject: Extreme Airport Africa - Pretty Fly
Description: A helicopter security team flees extreme weather. A bush pilot faces a test that will determine his aviation future. UN aviators fly emergency missions over Madagascar, and vets take to the skies for a flight to save the Black Rhino from extinction.

Subject: Ice Airport Alaska - Jumbo Crisis
Description: A damaged plane plunges Anchorage Airport into an emergency. A leak on a Coast Guard helicopter jeopardizes emergency cover. Rain turns the Fairbanks runways into ice rinks, and a dog-sled racing prodigy flies with furry teammates.

Subject: Ice Airport Alaska - Life Beyond Zero
Description: A father and son team of bush aviators flies a NASA expedition into the wilderness. A rookie airline pilot attempts a landing on a remote island. A seaplane mechanic starts a helicopter repair business, and customs agents.

Subject: Ice Airport Alaska - My Foggy Valentine
Description: Valentine's day delays loom when a squadron of F22 makes an unexpected landing; high winds threaten a helicopter's 600lb sling load; Aviators come to the rescue of a village without water.

Subject: Ice Airport Alaska - Winter Heat
Description: Customs agents intercept a grenade launcher smuggled into the U.S.; a blizzard threatens to cut off a remote island airport; warm winter weather turns a village runway to mud.

Subject: Ice Airport Alaska - Attack of the Yeti
Description: Bush aviators push the limit of their plane to deliver a two-ton generator. In Fairbanks, slippery runways threaten The Internation Ice Carving Championship and a high-tech airframe inspection on a Boeing 737 undercovers a poten.

Subject: Ice Airport Alaska - Moose vs Helicopter
Description: The first fly-by-wire helicopter is put through its paces, as test pilots harness freezing temperatures. In Anchorage, a jet is lifted for repairs. In Talkeetna, pilots fight ice to deliver supplies to a homesteader's cabin in a.

Subject: Ice Airport Alaska - Thanksgiving Day Delay
Description: A wolverine overcomes first-time flyer's nerves to travel to a new home. A helicopter pilot hunts for a showstopping ice cave. An 80-year-old cargo plane flies into the Arctic, and a wall of arctic fog threatens the airport wit.

Subject: Ice Airport Alaska - Edge of Today
Description: A heavy hauling helicopter flies across the frozen Bering Sea to the tiny island of Little Diomede, just 2.4 miles from Russia. At Fort Wainwright the Artic Angels prepare for a medevac mission and a veteran bush pilot tests his.

Subject: Ice Airport Alaska - Volcano Preppers
Description: When seismic activity around Mount Spurr heats up, pilots fly supplies to farmers. The operations team at Anchorage International deal with two emergency landings and proud parents turn to pilots to get them to a vital school ba.

Subject: Ice Airport Alaska - Top of the World
Description: Climbers landing on a glacier at the foot of Mount Denali, follow in the footsteps of?aviation pioneers. A swarm of 600,000 bees threatens the plane's structural ?integrity and veterinarians battling a rabies epidemic go up agai.

Subject: Extreme Airport Africa - Rhino Run
Description: A rookie pilot flies passengers for the first time, airport staff battle to prevent bird strikes, a helicopter carries a heavy load over Johannesburg, and Africa's most skilled helicopter pilots fly low to protect rhinos from poachers.

Subject: Extreme Airport Africa - Racing The Sun
Description: A mysterious engine fault delays a new airliner; scientists fly into the bush to hunt a killer disease; a broken-down plane closes a major runway, and a snake hunt across the airport ends in a face-off with a spitting cobra.

Subject: Extreme Airport Africa - Sky Cat
Description: A baboon invasion on a runway threatens to cut off a remote safari lodge, engine faults wreck airline flight schedules and a wild cheetah gets a first taste of flying.

Subject: Extreme Airport Africa - Tight Turnaround
Description: A wildlife invasion delays a flight, a massive airliner attempts a night landing at a bush airport, cargo handlers rush to deliver flowers in time for Mother's Day, and a patrol plane discovers fires raging through Kruger Nation.

Subject: Aerial America - Utah
Description: An amazing aerial tour over Utah reveals a state full of otherworldly landscapes and landmarks, including a history steeped in Mormonism, pioneering tragedy, and Olympic glory.

Subject: Aerial America - Roadside Attractions
Description: A cross-country aerial journey over America's most majestic and unique roadside attractions.

Subject: Aerial America - New England
Description: An aerial tour over New England captures its beauty while celebrating its rich history; from the Massachusetts harbours, where Americans rebelled against the British, to the autumn colours that blanket the mountains of Vermont.

Subject: Aerial America - Illinois
Description: A high-flying tour over Illinois; the Windy City, prairies and rivers; the state's dramatic history of great fires, crime and historic battles; Chicago's unique skyscrapers and the Lincoln Tomb.

Subject: Aerial America - Dallas - Fort Worth
Description: An aerial tour over Dallas and Fort Worth highlights the cities' differences while showcasing their shared contributions to the Texas narrative.

Subject: Aerial America - Iowa
Description: A sky-high tour over Iowa explores its vast stretches of farmland, covered bridges and evolution from wilderness to statehood.

Subject: Aerial America - New York City 24
Description: An aerial tour of New York City, spanning the city's five boroughs, capturing man-made and natural wonders; revealing the ways its citizens live, work and play.

Subject: Aerial America - New Hampshire
Description: Ancestral home of the Abenaki Indians; Henry David Thoreau's first book; Mount Monadnock; New Hampshire is seen from the air.

Subject: Aerial America - Indiana
Description: A flight over Indiana explores the Hoosier State's rich agriculture, busy highways and basketball legends; exploring the War Memorial and the Angel Mounds of the southwest.

Subject: Aerial America - Northern California
Description: A flight over Northern California explores ancient forests, timeless coasts, golden cities and the region's pioneering spirit.

Subject: Aerial America - Puerto Rico & US Virgin Islands
Description: A tour over two U.S. territories, Puerto Rico and the U.S. Virgin Islands.

Subject: Mighty Ships - Norwegian Epic
Description: The Norwegian Epic is a billion-dollar showboat with more than 20 bars and restaurants and pool decks that transform into nightclubs.

Subject: Mighty Cruise Ships - Nieuw Statendam
Description: One of Holland America Line's largest cruisers makes its debut in the Caribbean, highlighted by a visit to an exclusive private island resort.

Subject: Mighty Cruise Ships - MSC Divina
Description: Experience romance on a mega cruiser that pampers its guests with the best of Italian design and American convenience.

Subject: Mighty Cruise Ships - Roald Amundsen
Description: The world's latest, most-advanced expedition cruise ship Roald Amundsen whisks passengers on an adventurous voyage to Antarctica.

Subject: Mighty Trains - Kiwi Rail
Description: Two magnificent journeys with New Zealand's KiwiRail: the TranzAlpine, a five-hour journey across 223 kilometers, and Northern Explorer, an 11-hour trip through five unique regions of the North Island.

Subject: Mighty Ships - Quantum of the Seas
Description: Filled with big toys, guests fly the trapeze, surf and skydive without ever leaving the world's most innovative cruise ship.

Subject: Mighty Ships - Crystal Serenity
Description: The world's top cruise ship, the Crystal Serenity visits Sydney harbor, the port of Melbourne, Bali, a large-scale furniture load in Semarang, Indonesia and the port of Singapore.

Subject: Mighty Trains - Transcantabrico Clasico
Description: A trip aboard the luxury tourist train, Transcantábrico Clásico through Northern Spain along a historic 19th century rail line.

Subject: Mighty Trains - Coastal Pacific
Description: Travelling up the coast of New Zealand in style aboard the Coastal Pacific, a train that embodies the nation's spirit of grit and determination; for two years, this ride was shut down due to an earthquake in 2016.

Subject: Mighty Cruise Ships - Costa Diadema
Description: Costa Diadema's seven-day cruise around the Mediterranean offers Italian delights to its passengers and challenges to its captain and crew.

Subject: Mighty Cruise Ships - Diamond Princess
Description: Japan's largest cruise ship brings East and West together on a cruise featuring cherry.

Subject: Mighty Cruise Ships - AIDAnova
Description: We hop aboard a seven-day cruise to the Canary Islands and Madeira aboard the first large liner to run purely on cleaner-burning liquefied natural gas.

Subject: Mighty Cruise Ships - Seven Seas Explorer
Description: Sailing from Chile and Peru to Ecuador and Costa Rica, the luxurious Seven Seas Explorer cruise ship is full of marble, granite and almost 500 chandeliers.

Subject: How Did They Fix That? - Volcano Power
Description: Mike is in Iceland, where teams harness the power of volcanos to keep the geothermal energy flowing; they battle harsh weather to maintain and upgrade giant power systems, fixing miles of steam pipes. and bringing a dead well back to life.

Subject: How Did They Fix That?
Description: An in-depth look at how things are repaired.

Subject: How Did They Fix That? - Philadelphia Transit
Description: In Philadelphia, Mike Davidson is on streets, in tunnels, on tracks & in trolley restoration garages - working shoulder-to-shoulder with the team that keeps one of America's largest & oldest mass transit systems running smoothly and on time.

Subject: How Did They Fix That? - Water Work
Description: In Florida, Mike tackles one of the dangerous jobs on the planet, commercial diving; he helps a specialized team keep waterways safe; fixing construction site leaks and removing dangerous structures, all while hurricane season is in full swing.

Subject: How Did They Fix That? - Powerships
Description: Mike Davidson heads to Brazil, where an offshore crew is racing the clock to set up giant power ships to deliver electricity to a country in desperate need.

Subject: How Did They Fix That? - Water Bombers: Fixing Aerial Firefighters
Description: With wildfire season ahead, Mike works with an aerial firefighting company as they fix and convert aircraft into firefighting machines, including the transformation of a 1960's C130 plane from aged military aircraft into a stateofthe art waterbomber.

Subject: How Did They Build That? - High Waters & Harsh Winds
Description: Defy gravity in an Amsterdam high-rise that hangs 164 feet above the water; marvel at three interconnected towers in Chicago that have a road running through them; examine the revolutionary framework of Paris' controversial Pompidou Centre.

Subject: How Did They Build That? - Floating & Lifting
Description: Architects and engineers build an eco-friendly convention center on Vancouver's waterfront, a lift bridge in Bordeaux and a cocoon-shaped skyscraper in Tokyo each with unique challenges like marine habitats and massive spans.

Subject: How Did They Build That? - Parking & Sparkling
Description: A dazzling new 1400 foot tapering skyscraper is built right next to New York's Grand Central. A curving wine museum requires ingenious engineering in Bordeaux, France. And possibly the world's most glamorous parking garage.

Subject: How Did They Build That? - Sky Gardens & Seismic Stations
Description: The engineering secrets behind a massive sky garden in Singapore, the world's most slender tower in Brighton, and a railway station in the shadow of Vesuvius.

Subject: How Did They Build That? - Tricks & Trains
Description: A new Olympic and Paralympic museum tests engineers with its trailblazing accessible design. A dazzling curved glass skyscraper battles gravity in Milan. And a student center built under a noisy railroad.

Subject: How Did They Build That? - Steep & Stunning
Description: The engineering secrets behind the world's steepest mountain railway, a remodeled 145-year-old museum and a futuristic condo.

Subject: Air Disasters - Fight for Your Life
Description: Three FedEx employees must regain control of their plane when a coworker attacks them in midair.

Subject: Air Disasters - Design Flaws
Description: When former race car driver Niki Lauda's planes nosedives into a Thai jungle, a one-in-a-million failure reveals a weak spot in every Boeing 767; radio silence between pilots and air traffic controllers send investigators hunting for answers.

Subject: Air Disasters - Blow Out
Description: A cockpit window on British Airways Flight blows out, partially ejecting and injuring the captain; the co-pilot completes an emergency landing.

Subject: Air Disasters - Catastrophe at O'Hare
Description: On 25 May 1979, the number-one engine on American Airlines Flight 191 detaches moments after taking off from Chicago O'Hare International Airport. The aircraft banks to the left and crashes into an open field, killing all 271 people on board.

Subject: Air Disasters - Invisible Killer
Description: During a storm, a strong gale slams Delta Airlines Flight 191 to the ground, killing most people on board.

Subject: Air Disasters - A Wounded Bird
Description: A blade on the left-side propeller of Atlantic Southeast Airlines Flight breaks off; the imbalance of the rotating propeller causes the engine to partly tear itself from its mounting.

Subject: Air Disasters - Deadly Exchange
Description: When a commuter flight crashes mysteriously just a mile from a Missouri runway, investigators turn their attention to the final seconds in the cockpit.

Subject: Air Disasters - Fire Fight
Description: A mechanical problem aboard an Air Canada plane turns into an all-out emergency six miles in the air.

Subject: Air Disasters - Deadly Delivery
Description: UPS Airlines Flight 1354 clips the tops of trees and crashes into a hillside about one nautical mile short of the runway during final approach to Birmingham-Shuttlesworth International Airport in Alabama.

Subject: Air Disasters - Out of Sight
Description: In one of the world's busiest airports, a large passenger plane crashes into a smaller one; a 1986 midair crash between planes near Los Angeles brings attention to disturbing congestion at airports.

Subject: Air Disasters - Phantom Strike
Description: In September 2006, a brand-new legacy business jet collides with a Boeing 737 over the Amazon forest.

Subject: Air Disasters - Ripped Apart
Description: Design innovations evolve as a result of terrible air disasters due to pressurization failure or explosive decompression.

Subject: The Pacific War in Color - An Ocean Apart
Description: A look at life in the Pacific before, during, and after the attack on Pearl Harbor, presented through home movies and combat footage.

Subject: The Pacific War in Color - Shockwaves
Description: Months after the Pearl Harbor attack, shock waves reverberate in every corner of the Pacific; Americans deploy to stem the enemy's advance; after culture clashes, Allied forces later bond over efforts to thwart Japan's move to control New Guinea.

Subject: The Pacific War in Color - Island Hopping
Description: In 1943, the United States engages in a new series of island-hopping invasions; the first stop is the Tarawa Atoll, where troops embark upon the largest amphibious invasion ever staged in the Pacific to fight one of the costliest battles of the war.

Subject: The Pacific War in Color - The Enemy Underground
Description: By the summer of 1944, the United States is gaining the upper hand in the Pacific War with better training, troop numbers and supply lines; it aims for the heart of Japan's inner defense ring, engaging in a naval battle for Saipan in the Marianas.

Subject: The Pacific War in Color - Striking Distance
Description: Allied forces move to take the valuable islands of Tinian and Guam that threaten American air operations; meanwhile, Gen. Curtis LeMay is tasked with planning and executing a fire bombing campaign against Japan.

Subject: The Pacific War in Color - Fire From the Sky
Description: Allies slug it out on the island of Peleliu in a campaign to pave the way for Gen. MacArthur's return to the Philippines; footage shows troops enduring the muddy muck in the Philippines; Japan unveils a devastating new tactic, the kamikaze.

Subject: The Pacific War in Color - No Surrender
Description: By the spring of 1945, the United States begins to take back the Philippines; on Borneo, the Australians invade Labuan; when the United States invades Okinawa, Japan makes a strong stand and launches the biggest kamikaze attacks of the war.

Subject: The Pacific War in Color - From the Ashes
Description: President Harry Truman decides to drop the atomic bomb on Hiroshima and Nagasaki; Emperor Hirohito surrenders, and Gen. Douglas MacArthur arrives to oversee the country's occupation; mortal enemies must now become partners in Japan's rebirth.

Description: A look at life in the Pacific before, during, and after the attack on Pearl Harbor, presented through home movies and combat footage.

Subject: America's Secret D-Day Disaster
Description: The Allied forces' top-secret rehearsal for D-Day that went wrong.

Subject: D-Day and The Battle Of Normandy
D-Day and the Blitz
Description: How the Blitz on Britain turned civilians into ambulance drivers, firefighters and heroes to the rest of the world.

Subject: Aerial Australia - The Vast West
Description: Western Australia is home to colossal gold mines, massive sheep stations, the world's largest shark, an iconic and spectacular 4x4 trail, and Perth, the most isolated big city on Earth.

Subject: Aerial Australia - The Far South
Description: The Far South of Australia is home to the rich cultural heritage of Melbourne, a sporting mecca called the 'G, a brutal island prison once known as Hell on Earth, and ancient rainforests, providing a living link to the past.

Subject: Aerial Australia - The Extreme Center
Description: The hot, dry Extreme Center of Australia is home to landscapes like nowhere else on Earth, fearsome apex predators, a town built by opals, and Uluru, the cultural and spiritual heart of a nation.

Subject: Aerial Australia - Pacific Coast
Description: The Pacific Coast of Australia is home to Sydney's architectural icons, Byron Bay's iconic beach breaks, perilous white-water adventures, and the Great Barrier Reef, the largest living structure on Earth.

Subject: Aerial New Zealand
Description: An aerial tour over New Zealand showcases a diverse world of snow-capped mountains, active volcanoes, and a storied past.

Subject: Impractical Jokers - Call of the Wild
Description: The Jokers are back working as dry cleaners and TV producers, but one of them can't keep it together and must endure concertgoers who have escaped their enclosures.

Subject: Impractical Jokers - Behind Closed Doors
Description: The Jokers are locked in a supply closet and must decide who's endured the worst punishments to escape; as they argue over physical, embarrassing, and personal punishments, old clips resurface, and tensions rise.

Subject: Impractical Jokers - Facial Awareness
Description: The Jokers face off by recording voiceover for a fake video game and playing the concerned parent writing to their kid's school; but one Joker burns out with a punishment that's gotta sting.

Subject: Impractical Jokers - Customer Disservice
Description: Joey Fatone interviews the Jokers for a fake documentary; the guys react to an overly emotional phone call for an underwhelming reason; one Joker checks out and is forced into being the world's worst grocery store employee in his punishment.

Subject: Impractical Jokers - Rage Baiter
Description: The Jokers hit the grocery store aisles dressed in absurd disguises, then train someone in using aggressive phone tactics for charity donations. The losing Joker must subject themselves to scientific probing into their hidden emotions.

Subject: Impractical Jokers - Mind, Body, Swole
Description: The Jokers can't contain the laughs as they answer survey questions for a new snack food and present the world's worst pharmaceutical ads; the loser will work up a sweat in a punishment that's all pain, no gain.

Subject: Friends - The One With the Fertility Test
Description: Monica and Chandler run into an old acquaintance when they secretly go to a fertility clinic; Ross helps Joey woo the same professor (Aisha Tyler) he wants to date.

Subject: Friends - The One With the Donor
Description: Monica and Chandler interview unsuspecting candidates, hoping to find the right man to father their baby.

Subject: Friends - The One in Barbados
Description: The gang heads to Barbados for a paleontology convention where Ross is the keynote speaker; David (Hank Azaria) prepares to propose to Phoebe, but ex-boyfriend Mike (Paul Rudd) is not yet out of the picture.

Subject: Friends - The One in Barbados
Description: The gang heads to Barbados for a paleontology convention where Ross is the keynote speaker; David (Hank Azaria) prepares to propose to Phoebe, but ex-boyfriend Mike (Paul Rudd) is not yet out of the picture.

Subject: Friends - The One After Joey & Rachel Kiss
Description: In Barbados, Monica, Chandler and Phoebe eavesdrop on their friends' passionate encounters; Monica styles her hair to look like a blowfish; Phoebe and Mike rekindle their romance.

Subject: Friends - The One Where Ross Is Fine
Description: Ross drinks too much alcohol at dinner with Rachel, Joey and Charlie; Frank Jr. (Giovanni Ribisi) cannot cope with his precocious triplets.

Subject: Friends - The One With Ross's Tan
Description: Rachel and Joey nervously anticipate their first real date; Monica and Phoebe try to avoid an obnoxious friend with a fake British accent; Ross emerges from a tanning booth with a two-toned appearance.

Subject: White House Down (2013)
Description: While on a tour of the White House with his young daughter, a Capitol policeman springs into action to save his child and protect the president from a heavily armed group of paramilitary invaders.

Subject: Independence Day (1996)
Description: When alien invaders lay waste to planet Earth, it's up to a select group of survivors to make a last-ditch stand. Fighting superior technology, mankind's best weapon is the will to survive.

Subject: Captain America: The Winter Soldier (2014)
Description: Captain America (Chris Evans), the Black Widow (Scarlett Johansson) and a new ally, the Falcon, face an unexpected enemy as they struggle to expose a far-reaching conspiracy that puts the world at risk.

Subject: Captain America: Civil War (2016)
Description: Black Widow (Scarlett Johansson) and Hawkeye must pick a side when a feud between Captain America (Chris Evans) and Iron Man (Robert Downey Jr.) leaves the Avengers in turmoil.

Subject: Captain America: Civil War (2016)
Description: Black Widow (Scarlett Johansson) and Hawkeye must pick a side when a feud between Captain America (Chris Evans) and Iron Man (Robert Downey Jr.) leaves the Avengers in turmoil.

Subject: White House Down (2013)
Description: While on a tour of the White House with his young daughter, a Capitol policeman springs into action to save his child and protect the president from a heavily armed group of paramilitary invaders.

Subject: Impractical Jokers - Meat Cute
Description: Attention shoppers; the Jokers make mischief by taking unflattering pictures of grocery store patrons, then posing as horrible employees at the Yeti store; tonight's loser must meat his fate in a punishment.

Subject: Impractical Jokers - Dopamine Denier
Description: The Jokers play unprofessional actors in a fake commercial then make wild assumptions about other mallgoers; one Joker breaks and is tasked with becoming the strictest security guard imaginable in his punishment.

Subject: Impractical Jokers - Hoop! There It Is!
Description: The Jokers pretend to be medical students in training with standardized patient actors, then play the hero and break up a public fight, hoping to earn applause; one Joker has to put his hips where his mouth is and settle a bet of his own making.

Subject: Impractical Jokers - Bret Michaels
Description: Sal, Q and Murr are crashing and burning into product displays and hiding in tight spaces, but one of them must face the music with celebrity guest Bret Michaels.

Subject: Impractical Jokers - Post Malone
Description: The jokers give unsolicited etiquette advice and live tape strange product reviews; one lucky joker takes all the blame for celebrity guest Post Malone.

Subject: Friends - The One With the Cake
Description: Rachel gets Monica and Chandler to delay their trip to Vermont for Emma's first birthday bash.

Subject: Friends - The One Where Rachel's Sister Baby-Sits
Description: Rachel feels like her younger sister, Amy, is finally on the verge of making a major change in her attitude; in order to help Amy become a more responsible person, Rachel overrides Ross' strong protests and allows Amy to baby-sit Emma.

Subject: Friends - The One With Ross's Grant
Description: When Ross interviews with Charlie's ex-boyfriend (Greg Kinnear) for a prized grant, the doctor makes a shocking stipulation; Chandler lies about watching Joey's bizarre audition tape.

Subject: Friends - The One With the Home Study
Description: Monica and Chandler fuss over their apartment as they expect a visit from the adoption worker, Laura; Phoebe and Mike opt for a small wedding and donate the extra money to a children's charity.

Subject: Friends - The One With the Late Thanksgiving
Description: Monica prepares a Thanksgiving feast for the gang, then becomes enraged when everyone shows up late; Phoebe convinces Rachel to enter Emma in a baby beauty contest.

Subject: Friends - The One With the Birth Mother
Description: A prospective birth mother (Anna Faris) labors under a misconception about Monica and Chandler's respective occupations.

Subject: Friends - The One Where Chandler Gets Caught
Description: Rachel and Phoebe spot Chandler getting into a car with a mystery blonde; the friends reminisce about memorable moments.

Subject: Friends - The One Where the Stripper Cries
Description: Joey appears as a celebrity contestant on ``$100,000 Pyramid``; Monica and Rachel hire an ungainly stripper for Phoebe's bachelorette party.

Subject: Bridesmaids (2011)
Description: Though broke and lovelorn, a woman (Kristen Wiig) takes on the strange and expensive rituals associated with being her best friend's maid of honor.

Subject: The Intern (2015)
Description: Dissatisfied with retirement, a 70-year-old widower becomes an intern at an online fashion site and develops a special bond with his young boss.

Subject: The Big Bang Theory - The Grasshopper Experiment
Description: On a blind date, Koothrappali discovers that he can talk to the opposite sex after a few drinks, but his date takes an interest in Sheldon.

Subject: The Big Bang Theory - The Cooper-Hofstadter Polarization
Description: Penny tries to mediate when Sheldon and Leonard disagree on whether to present their joint findings at a physics conference.

Subject: The Big Bang Theory - The Loobenfeld Decay
Description: Leonard and Sheldon try to avoid seeing Penny perform after hearing her sing, but the elaborate lie Sheldon tells leads to an unexpected result.

Subject: The Big Bang Theory - The Pancake Batter Anomaly
Description: Leonard and the boys avoid Sheldon when he gets sick, leaving Penny to nurse him back to health.

Subject: The Big Bang Theory - The Jerusalem Duality
Description: Sheldon and Leonard look for a way to derail a 15-year-old physics prodigy's research.

Subject: The Big Bang Theory - The Bat Jar Conjecture

Description: Detectives discover a kidnapped girl in the trunk of a stolen rental car; the suspect's rage seriously injures Stabler; the trial forces Novak to face dark things in her past.

Subject: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit - Limitations
Description: The detectives must solve a 5-year-old sexual assault case before the statute of limitations closes it.

Subject: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit - Greed
Description: Benson and Stabler investigate two rapes that appear to have been committed by the same man; Mary Beth Hurt and Henry Winkler guest star.

Subject: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit - Class
Description: When a coed dependent upon financial aid is found dead with a large sum of cash, detectives suspect her wealthy roommate.

Subject: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit - Fat
Description: A band of overweight teenage siblings attacks a gifted piano student from Harlem.

Subject: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit - Influence
Description: An unstable woman stops taking medication and mows down 10 people with her car; a former rock star wages an anti-psychiatric-drug campaign.

Subject: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit - Clock
Description: Stabler and Fin investigate the disappearance of two high-school students from a museum field-trip; Stabler meets his new partner.

Subject: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit - Real Fake News
Description: The investigation of a congressman falsely accused of soliciting underage girls leads the SVU to a sex trafficking ring; Benson and Rollins are the targets of a salacious website.

Subject: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit - Mood
Description: Rollins and Carisi suspect a woman's bizarre rape story is fabricated; Benson goes on the offensive when her personal life is scrutinized.

Subject: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit - No Good Reason
Description: A teenager disappears after schoolmates make her the subject of a vicious cyberbullying attack.

Subject: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit - Something Happened
Description: Benson must disclose the secrets of her past to help a rape victim recall the details of one terrible, traumatic night.

Subject: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit - Eighteen Wheels a Predator
Description: Rollins and Fin investigate an assault in Kentucky that has striking similarities to that of a victim found in Central Park; Benson receives intel that turns the case upside down.

Subject: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit - Outcry
Description: When a missing 16-year-old girl is found in a deserted building, she tells the skeptical detectives that three men in uniform kept her there for several days.

Subject: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit - Birthright
Description: A woman attempts to kidnap a child she believes is her daughter; while DNA tests are in progress, Benson traces the confusion about the child's origins back to a fertility doctor.

Subject: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit - Once Upon a Time in El Barrio
Description: Velasco asks Benson for help finding three girls who were trafficked from his hometown to New York City.

Subject: Knox Goes Away (2023)
Description: Diagnosed with a rapidly evolving form of dementia, a contract killer gets the chance to redeem himself by saving the life of his estranged son.

Subject: Maggie (2015)
Description: When a deadly zombie virus sweeps the nation, a father stops at nothing to save his infected daughter.

Subject: Jackie (2016)
Description: The assassination of JFK is seen through the eyes of Jackie Kennedy. The days leading up to the tragedy and the immediate aftermath are chronicled, as experienced by the First Lady, wife of the charismatic president and mother of two small children.

Subject: Going the Distance (2010)
Description: A California-based journalism student (Drew Barrymore) and her New York lover (Justin Long) try valiantly to keep their bicoastal romance alive.

Subject: Past Lives (2023)
Description: Nora and Hae Sung, two deeply connected childhood friends, are wrest apart after Nora's family emigrates from South Korea. Decades later, they are reunited for one fateful week as they confront destiny, love and the choices that make a life.

Subject: A Thousand Words (2012)
Description: A fast-talking literary agent (Eddie Murphy) must learn how to live without speech upon discovering that he has only a thousand words left to say before he dies.

Description: Called back into action by her mentor, CIA agent Alice Racine learns that uncovered classified information has been compromised. She must now turn to former soldier Jack Alcott to help her prevent a lethal biological attack on London.

Subject: Chronicle (2012)
Description: Three high-school friends make a discovery that gives them incredible superpowers, but their lives spin out of control when their darker sides begin to emerge.

Subject: Magic Mike's Last Dance (2023)
Description: Hoping for one last hurrah, Mike Lane heads to London with a wealthy socialite who lures him with an offer he can't refuse. With everything on the line, he soon finds himself trying to whip a hot new roster of talented dancers into shape.

Subject: The Mountain Between Us (2017)
Description: Stranded on a mountain after a plane crash, two strangers must work together to survive the extreme elements of the remote, snow-covered terrain. Realizing that help is not on the way, they embark on a perilous journey across hundreds of miles.

Subject: Problemista (2023)
Description: Alejandro, an aspiring toy designer from El Salvador, tries to bring his fanciful ideas to life and chase his dream in New York City with the help of his erratic employer.

Subject: Alan Partridge (2013)
Description: Radio host Alan Partridge (Steve Coogan) gets a chance to boost his sagging career by serving as a liaison between police and his former co-host (Colm Meaney), who has taken hostages at their radio station.

Subject: Marshall (2017)
Description: Young Thurgood Marshall faces one of his greatest challenges while working as a lawyer for the NAACP. He teams up with lawyer Sam Friedman to defend Joseph Spell, a Black chauffeur whose employer accuses him of sexual assault and attempted murder.

Subject: Menashe (2017)
Description: Deep in the heart of New York's notoriously secretive Hasidic Jewish community, Menashe, a good-hearted but somewhat hapless grocery store clerk, struggles against tradition to keep custody of his only son after his wife passes away.

Subject: Unknown (2011)
Description: After a serious car accident, a man (Liam Neeson) awakes to find that his wife does not recognize him, that another man has assumed his identity, and that assassins are hunting him.

Subject: It Follows (2014)
Description: Following a strange sexual encounter, a teenager (Maika Monroe) has disturbing visions and the inescapable feeling that someone -- or something -- is stalking her.

Subject: Pawn (2013)
Description: A robbery turns into a tense hostage situation when three gunmen hold up a diner the mob uses as a front.

Subject: Battle of the Sexes (2017)
Description: The 1973 tennis match between Billie Jean King and Bobby Riggs became the most watched televised sports event of all time. While trapped in the media glare, King and Riggs fight more personal and complex battles.

Subject: We Live in Time (2024)
Description: A surprise encounter brings together a couple, changing the course of their lives. Challenged by the limits of time, they learn to cherish each moment of their decade-spanning and movingly rare love story.

Subject: The Knick - Ten Knots
Description: Dr. Edwards lobbies to be appointed chief of surgery; Dr. Gallinger refuses to return as Edwards' subordinate; Lucy's attempts to make amends with Bertie are rebuffed; Cleary schemes to make extra money.

Subject: The Knick - You're No Rose
Description: Dr. Thackery sets his sights on a return to the Knick; Cornelia enlists Cleary to do a dirty job; Bertie makes a change; Robertson pushes a new subway initiative; Barrow drives up construction costs; an unexpected visitor surprises Lucy.

Subject: The Knick - The Best With the Best to Get the Best
Description: Thackery enlists Edwards to help him test a new hypothesis; Lucy learns that confession is not always good for the soul; a young journalist works on a story about one of Thackery's rivals; Barrow faces a new adversary at Tammany Hall.

Subject: The Knick - Wonderful Surprises
Description: Abby's worsening condition persuades Thackery to test out his novel syphilis treatment; Edwards comes clean to Opal but is surprised at her response; Cornelia probes a suspicious death.

Subject: The Knick - Whiplash
Description: The Knick faces an influx of patients following a subway explosion; Lucy takes advice from one of Ping Wu's girls; Thackery tests out his latest theory on addiction; Genevieve charms the Chickerings.

Subject: Trap (2024)
Description: A man and his teenage daughter realize they're at the center of a dark and sinister event while watching a concert.

Subject: Your Monster (2024)

Subject: Midsommar (2019)
Description: A young American couple, their relationship foundering, travel to a Swedish midsummer festival where a seemingly pastoral paradise transforms into a sinister, dread-soaked nightmare as the locals reveal their terrifying agenda.

Description: A thief (Leonardo DiCaprio) who enters people's dreams and steals their secrets gets a shot at redemption when he is given the dangerous task of planting an idea in someone's subconscious.

Subject: Skiptrace (2016)
Description: A detective from Hong Kong teams up with an American gambler to battle a Chinese criminal.

Subject: Chronicle (2012)
Description: Three high-school friends make a discovery that gives them incredible superpowers, but their lives spin out of control when their darker sides begin to emerge.

Description: The possibility of a new romance leads a self-help guru (Aaron Eckhart) to the realization that he has never truly confronted his wife's death.

Subject: On Chesil Beach (2017)
Description: In 1962, newlyweds Edward and Florence, both in their early 20s and also both virgins, spend their honeymoon preoccupied and terrified by the upcoming consummation of their marriage.

Subject: Pan (2015)
Description: Living a bleak existence at a London orphanage, 12-year-old Peter finds himself whisked away to the fantastical world of Neverland. With the turn of events, soon he has to save Neverland from the pirate Blackbeard.

Subject: Tuesday (2023)
Description: A mother and her daughter must confront Death when it arrives in the form of an astonishing talking bird.

Subject: A Perfect Getaway (2009)
Description: Newlyweds (Steve Zahn, Milla Jovovich) find terror in paradise when they encounter other hikers who claim that some tourists were found brutally murdered.

Subject: Janet Planet (2023)
Description: Enthralled by her own imagination, 11-year-old Lacy spends the long summer at home with her mother and three strangers.

Subject: My Cousin Rachel (2017)
Description: Philip is a young Englishman who falls under the spell of a beautiful but manipulative woman named Rachel. As his obsession for her grows, she hatches a scheme to win back her late husband's estate from the unsuspecting Philip.

Subject: Queer (2024)
Description: Lee, a solitary American in Mexico City, falls for a beautiful, elusive former soldier. Journeying together into the jungle, Lee sees, for the first time, the possibility of an intimate and infinite love.

Subject: Ruby Sparks (2012)
Description: A struggling novelist (Paul Dano) creates an inspirational female character, who somehow leaps from the page into his home as a real flesh-and-blood woman (Zoe Kazan).

Subject: 2 Days in New York (2012)
Description: A happily married man's (Chris Rock) sanity is pushed to the limit when his wife's (Julie Delpy) crazed, over-sexed French relatives crash their cramped New York apartment.

Subject: Funny People (2009)
Description: A gravely ill comic (Adam Sandler) takes a struggling performer (Seth Rogen) under his wing, then gets a chance to re-evaluate his life when his disease goes into remission.

Subject: St. Vincent (2014)
Description: An unlikely bond forms between a single woman's 12-year-old son and the boozy misanthrope who lives next door.

Subject: A Ghost Story (2017)
Description: A passionate young couple, unexpectedly separated by a shocking loss, discover an eternal connection and a love that is infinite.

Subject: The Perks of Being a Wallflower (2012)
Description: Socially awkward Charlie is a wallflower watching from the sidelines, until a pair of charismatic seniors take him under their wing.

Subject: The 9th Life of Louis Drax (2016)
Description: An acclaimed neurologist (Jamie Dornan) taps into the unconscious mind of a 9-year-old boy (Aiden Longworth) who has survived nine near-death accidents.

Subject: Going the Distance (2010)
Description: A California-based journalism student (Drew Barrymore) and her New York lover (Justin Long) try valiantly to keep their bicoastal romance alive.

Subject: Getaway (2013)
Description: To save his kidnapped wife, a former race-car driver (Ethan Hawke) must follow the instructions of a man (Jon Voight) who is watching his every move through a hidden camera.

Subject: Bronson (2008)
Description: Incarcerated as a very young man, Michael Peterson (Tom Hardy) morphs into a personality called Charles Bronson and becomes England's most-violent prisoner.

Subject: 3 From Hell (2019)
Description: Crazed killers Baby Firefly, Captain Spaulding and Otis Driftwood unleash bloody mayhem after escaping from prison.

Subject: Beyond the Black Rainbow (2011)
Description: A heavily sedated woman (Eva Allan) with ESP tries to escape from the secluded commune where she's been held captive.

Subject: The Belko Experiment (2016)
Description: Trapped inside their office building, 80 employees (John Gallagher Jr., Tony Goldwyn, Adria Arjona) at a Colombian corporation must play a sadistic game of survival that requires them to kill a certain number of co-workers.

Subject: The Florida Project (2017)
Description: Set in the shadow of the most magical place on Earth, 6-year-old Moonee and her two best friends forge their own adventures, while Moonee's struggling mom and a kindhearted motel manager protect the kids from the harsh reality that surrounds them.

Subject: Spaceship Earth (2020)
Description: In 1991 eight visionaries embark on a two-year experiment to quarantine themselves inside Biosphere 2 -- a self-engineered replica of Earth's ecosystem.

Subject: Captain Fantastic (2016)
Description: Raised in the forest and living off the grid, six children venture into the outside world for the first time when their recently widowed father takes them on a road trip.

Subject: End of Watch (2012)
Description: Two LAPD officers deal with marriage, love and fatherhood amid the harsh realities on the streets of Los Angeles.

Subject: Speed (1994)
Description: A SWAT team ace (Keanu Reeves) must keep the speed of a Santa Monica bus above 50 mph, or a madman's (Dennis Hopper) bomb will explode.

Subject: Black Adam (2022)
Description: Bestowed with the almighty powers of the gods, Black Adam's unique form of justice, born out of rage, is challenged by modern-day heroes who form the Justice Society: Hawkman, Dr. Fate, Atom Smasher and Cyclone.

Subject: The Flash (2023)
Description: Worlds collide when the Flash travels back in time to change the events of the past. However, when his attempt to save his family alters the future, he becomes trapped in a reality in which General Zod has returned, threatening annihilation.

Subject: Unlocked (2017)
Description: Called back into action by her mentor, CIA agent Alice Racine learns that uncovered classified information has been compromised. She must now turn to former soldier Jack Alcott to help her prevent a lethal biological attack on London.

Subject: Unknown (2011)
Description: After a serious car accident, a man (Liam Neeson) awakes to find that his wife does not recognize him, that another man has assumed his identity, and that assassins are hunting him.

Subject: The Mummy (2017)
Description: An ancient Egyptian princess is awakened from her crypt beneath the desert, bringing with her malevolence grown over millennia, and terrors that defy human comprehension.

Subject: Dredd (2012)
Description: In a violent, futuristic metropolis, a law-enforcement officer (Karl Urban) and his rookie trainee (Olivia Thirlby) become caught up in a high-stakes conflict with a vicious prostitute-turned-drug lord (Lena Headey).

Subject: Beirut (2018)
Description: In 1980s Beirut, Mason Skiles is a former U.S. diplomat who returns to service to save a colleague from the group that is possibly responsible for his own family's death.

Subject: Good Time (2017)
Description: A bank robber stops at nothing to free his brother from prison, launching himself into a nightlong odyssey through New York's dark and dangerous criminal underworld.

Subject: Superman (1978)
Description: Jor-El (Marlon Brando) of Krypton sends his baby to Earth, where he grows up as Clark Kent (Christopher Reeve) and works at the Daily Planet.

Subject: Superman II (1980)
Description: The Man of Steel (Christopher Reeve) gets serious with Lois Lane (Margot Kidder) and fights three Krypton outcasts in league with Lex Luthor (Gene Hackman).

Subject: Superman III (1983)
Description: Ersatz kryptonite laced with tobacco tar splits Superman (Christopher Reeve) in two: good Clark Kent and bad Man of Steel.

Subject: Superman IV: The Quest for Peace (1987)
Description: The Man of Steel (Christopher Reeve) crusades for nuclear disarmament and meets Lex Luthor's (Gene Hackman) latest creation, Nuclear Man.

Subject: Superman Returns (2006)
Description: While Lex Luthor plots against him, the Man of Steel tries to reconnect with Lois Lane and find his place in a world that learned to survive in his absence.

Subject: Man of Steel (2013)
Description: Though struggling with the ramifications of his extraordinary origin and abilities, young Clark Kent (Henry Cavill) must become a hero and save those he loves from a dire threat.

Subject: Suicide Squad (2016)
Description: Deadshot, Harley Quinn, Captain Boomerang, Killer Croc and other armed supervillains unite to battle a mysterious and powerful entity, while the diabolical Joker launches an evil agenda of his own.

Subject: Shazam! (2019)
Description: Billy Batson is a streetwise 14-year-old who can magically transform into the adult superhero Shazam simply by shouting out one word. His newfound powers soon get put to the test when he squares off against the evil Dr. Thaddeus Sivana.

Subject: Shazam! Fury of the Gods (2023)
Description: When a vengeful trio of ancient gods arrives on Earth in search of the magic stolen from them long ago, Shazam and his allies get thrust into a battle for their superpowers, their lives and the fate of the world.

Subject: Green Lantern (2011)
Description: The Green Lanterns have little regard for humans, who have been unable to harness the powers of the ring each member wears. But Jordan, a test pilot, may be the corps' only hope when an enemy called Parallax threatens the universal balance of power.

Subject: Green Lantern: First Flight (2009)
Description: The Green Lantern (Christopher Meloni) must race against time to stop Sinestro (Victor Garber) from unleashing a sinister plot. Animated.

Subject: Green Lantern: Beware My Power (2022)
Description: When a Power Ring is bestowed upon former Marine John Stewart, it leads him on a life-changing mission. With Justice League member Green Arrow and Thanagarian Hawkgirl by his side, Stewart is thrown into a complicated galactic war. Animated.

Subject: Wild Mountain Thyme (2020)
Description: Rosemary has her heart set on winning Anthony's affections. Having been stung by his father's plan to sell his farm in Ireland to his American nephew, Anthony is jolted into pursuing his dreams.

Subject: Raise Hell: The Life & Times of Molly Ivins (2019)
Description: The life and work of Molly Ivins, a political journalist from Texas, best-selling author, and Bill of Rights warrior.

Description: Two women (Maggie Gyllenhaal, Viola Davis) contend with a powerful bureaucracy and a system mired in traditional thinking in order to transform their children's failing inner-city school.

Subject: Funny People (2009)
Description: A gravely ill comic (Adam Sandler) takes a struggling performer (Seth Rogen) under his wing, then gets a chance to re-evaluate his life when his disease goes into remission.

Subject: St. Vincent (2014)
Description: An unlikely bond forms between a single woman's 12-year-old son and the boozy misanthrope who lives next door.

Subject: A Ghost Story (2017)
Description: A passionate young couple, unexpectedly separated by a shocking loss, discover an eternal connection and a love that is infinite.

Subject: The Perks of Being a Wallflower (2012)
Description: Socially awkward Charlie is a wallflower watching from the sidelines, until a pair of charismatic seniors take him under their wing.

Subject: The 9th Life of Louis Drax (2016)
Description: An acclaimed neurologist (Jamie Dornan) taps into the unconscious mind of a 9-year-old boy (Aiden Longworth) who has survived nine near-death accidents.

Subject: The Mountain Between Us (2017)
Description: Stranded on a mountain after a plane crash, two strangers must work together to survive the extreme elements of the remote, snow-covered terrain. Realizing that help is not on the way, they embark on a perilous journey across hundreds of miles.

Subject: Magic Mike's Last Dance (2023)
Description: Hoping for one last hurrah, Mike Lane heads to London with a wealthy socialite who lures him with an offer he can't refuse. With everything on the line, he soon finds himself trying to whip a hot new roster of talented dancers into shape.

Subject: Going the Distance (2010)
Description: A California-based journalism student (Drew Barrymore) and her New York lover (Justin Long) try valiantly to keep their bicoastal romance alive.

Subject: Getaway (2013)
Description: To save his kidnapped wife, a former race-car driver (Ethan Hawke) must follow the instructions of a man (Jon Voight) who is watching his every move through a hidden camera.

Subject: Bronson (2008)
Description: Incarcerated as a very young man, Michael Peterson (Tom Hardy) morphs into a personality called Charles Bronson and becomes England's most-violent prisoner.

Subject: 3 From Hell (2019)
Description: Crazed killers Baby Firefly, Captain Spaulding and Otis Driftwood unleash bloody mayhem after escaping from prison.

Subject: Beyond the Black Rainbow (2011)
Description: A heavily sedated woman (Eva Allan) with ESP tries to escape from the secluded commune where she's been held captive.

Subject: The Belko Experiment (2016)
Description: Trapped inside their office building, 80 employees (John Gallagher Jr., Tony Goldwyn, Adria Arjona) at a Colombian corporation must play a sadistic game of survival that requires them to kill a certain number of co-workers.

Subject: The Florida Project (2017)
Description: Set in the shadow of the most magical place on Earth, 6-year-old Moonee and her two best friends forge their own adventures, while Moonee's struggling mom and a kindhearted motel manager protect the kids from the harsh reality that surrounds them.

Subject: Spaceship Earth (2020)
Description: In 1991 eight visionaries embark on a two-year experiment to quarantine themselves inside Biosphere 2 -- a self-engineered replica of Earth's ecosystem.

Subject: Captain Fantastic (2016)
Description: Raised in the forest and living off the grid, six children venture into the outside world for the first time when their recently widowed father takes them on a road trip.

Subject: End of Watch (2012)
Description: Two LAPD officers deal with marriage, love and fatherhood amid the harsh realities on the streets of Los Angeles.

Subject: Speed (1994)
Description: A SWAT team ace (Keanu Reeves) must keep the speed of a Santa Monica bus above 50 mph, or a madman's (Dennis Hopper) bomb will explode.

Subject: Black Adam (2022)
Description: Bestowed with the almighty powers of the gods, Black Adam's unique form of justice, born out of rage, is challenged by modern-day heroes who form the Justice Society: Hawkman, Dr. Fate, Atom Smasher and Cyclone.

Subject: The Flash (2023)
Description: Worlds collide when the Flash travels back in time to change the events of the past. However, when his attempt to save his family alters the future, he becomes trapped in a reality in which General Zod has returned, threatening annihilation.

Subject: Unlocked (2017)
Description: Called back into action by her mentor, CIA agent Alice Racine learns that uncovered classified information has been compromised. She must now turn to former soldier Jack Alcott to help her prevent a lethal biological attack on London.

Description: After a serious car accident, a man (Liam Neeson) awakes to find that his wife does not recognize him, that another man has assumed his identity, and that assassins are hunting him.

Subject: The Mummy (2017)
Description: An ancient Egyptian princess is awakened from her crypt beneath the desert, bringing with her malevolence grown over millennia, and terrors that defy human comprehension.

Subject: Dredd (2012)
Description: In a violent, futuristic metropolis, a law-enforcement officer (Karl Urban) and his rookie trainee (Olivia Thirlby) become caught up in a high-stakes conflict with a vicious prostitute-turned-drug lord (Lena Headey).

Subject: Beirut (2018)
Description: In 1980s Beirut, Mason Skiles is a former U.S. diplomat who returns to service to save a colleague from the group that is possibly responsible for his own family's death.

Subject: Good Time (2017)
Description: A bank robber stops at nothing to free his brother from prison, launching himself into a nightlong odyssey through New York's dark and dangerous criminal underworld.

Description: Jor-El (Marlon Brando) of Krypton sends his baby to Earth, where he grows up as Clark Kent (Christopher Reeve) and works at the Daily Planet.

Description: The Man of Steel (Christopher Reeve) gets serious with Lois Lane (Margot Kidder) and fights three Krypton outcasts in league with Lex Luthor (Gene Hackman).

Subject: Superman III (1983)
Description: Ersatz kryptonite laced with tobacco tar splits Superman (Christopher Reeve) in two: good Clark Kent and bad Man of Steel.

Description: The Man of Steel (Christopher Reeve) crusades for nuclear disarmament and meets Lex Luthor's (Gene Hackman) latest creation, Nuclear Man.

Description: While Lex Luthor plots against him, the Man of Steel tries to reconnect with Lois Lane and find his place in a world that learned to survive in his absence.

Description: Though struggling with the ramifications of his extraordinary origin and abilities, young Clark Kent (Henry Cavill) must become a hero and save those he loves from a dire threat.

Description: Deadshot, Harley Quinn, Captain Boomerang, Killer Croc and other armed supervillains unite to battle a mysterious and powerful entity, while the diabolical Joker launches an evil agenda of his own.

Description: Billy Batson is a streetwise 14-year-old who can magically transform into the adult superhero Shazam simply by shouting out one word. His newfound powers soon get put to the test when he squares off against the evil Dr. Thaddeus Sivana.

Subject: Shazam! Fury of the Gods (2023)
Description: When a vengeful trio of ancient gods arrives on Earth in search of the magic stolen from them long ago, Shazam and his allies get thrust into a battle for their superpowers, their lives and the fate of the world.

Subject: Green Lantern (2011)
Description: The Green Lanterns have little regard for humans, who have been unable to harness the powers of the ring each member wears. But Jordan, a test pilot, may be the corps' only hope when an enemy called Parallax threatens the universal balance of power.

Description: The Green Lantern (Christopher Meloni) must race against time to stop Sinestro (Victor Garber) from unleashing a sinister plot. Animated.

Description: When a Power Ring is bestowed upon former Marine John Stewart, it leads him on a life-changing mission. With Justice League member Green Arrow and Thanagarian Hawkgirl by his side, Stewart is thrown into a complicated galactic war. Animated.

Description: The life and work of Molly Ivins, a political journalist from Texas, best-selling author, and Bill of Rights warrior.

Description: Enthralled by her own imagination, 11-year-old Lacy spends the long summer at home with her mother and three strangers.

Description: Diagnosed with a rapidly evolving form of dementia, a contract killer gets the chance to redeem himself by saving the life of his estranged son.

Subject: Maggie (2015)
Description: When a deadly zombie virus sweeps the nation, a father stops at nothing to save his infected daughter.

Description: A California-based journalism student (Drew Barrymore) and her New York lover (Justin Long) try valiantly to keep their bicoastal romance alive.

Description: A fast-talking literary agent (Eddie Murphy) must learn how to live without speech upon discovering that he has only a thousand words left to say before he dies.

Description: Alejandro, an aspiring toy designer from El Salvador, tries to bring his fanciful ideas to life and chase his dream in New York City with the help of his erratic employer.

Subject: Alan Partridge (2013)
Description: Radio host Alan Partridge (Steve Coogan) gets a chance to boost his sagging career by serving as a liaison between police and his former co-host (Colm Meaney), who has taken hostages at their radio station.

Description: Young Thurgood Marshall faces one of his greatest challenges while working as a lawyer for the NAACP. He teams up with lawyer Sam Friedman to defend Joseph Spell, a Black chauffeur whose employer accuses him of sexual assault and attempted murder.

Subject: Menashe (2017)
Description: Deep in the heart of New York's notoriously secretive Hasidic Jewish community, Menashe, a good-hearted but somewhat hapless grocery store clerk, struggles against tradition to keep custody of his only son after his wife passes away.

Subject: Unknown (2011)
Description: After a serious car accident, a man (Liam Neeson) awakes to find that his wife does not recognize him, that another man has assumed his identity, and that assassins are hunting him.

Description: Following a strange sexual encounter, a teenager (Maika Monroe) has disturbing visions and the inescapable feeling that someone -- or something -- is stalking her.

Subject: Pawn (2013)
Description: A robbery turns into a tense hostage situation when three gunmen hold up a diner the mob uses as a front.

Subject: Battle of the Sexes (2017)
Description: The 1973 tennis match between Billie Jean King and Bobby Riggs became the most watched televised sports event of all time. While trapped in the media glare, King and Riggs fight more personal and complex battles.

Description: A surprise encounter brings together a couple, changing the course of their lives. Challenged by the limits of time, they learn to cherish each moment of their decade-spanning and movingly rare love story.

Subject: The Knick - Ten Knots
Description: Dr. Edwards lobbies to be appointed chief of surgery; Dr. Gallinger refuses to return as Edwards' subordinate; Lucy's attempts to make amends with Bertie are rebuffed; Cleary schemes to make extra money.

Subject: The Knick - You're No Rose
Description: Dr. Thackery sets his sights on a return to the Knick; Cornelia enlists Cleary to do a dirty job; Bertie makes a change; Robertson pushes a new subway initiative; Barrow drives up construction costs; an unexpected visitor surprises Lucy.

Subject: The Knick - The Best With the Best to Get the Best
Description: Thackery enlists Edwards to help him test a new hypothesis; Lucy learns that confession is not always good for the soul; a young journalist works on a story about one of Thackery's rivals; Barrow faces a new adversary at Tammany Hall.

Subject: The Knick - Wonderful Surprises
Description: Abby's worsening condition persuades Thackery to test out his novel syphilis treatment; Edwards comes clean to Opal but is surprised at her response; Cornelia probes a suspicious death.

Subject: The Knick - Whiplash
Description: The Knick faces an influx of patients following a subway explosion; Lucy takes advice from one of Ping Wu's girls; Thackery tests out his latest theory on addiction; Genevieve charms the Chickerings.

Subject: Trap (2024)
Description: A man and his teenage daughter realize they're at the center of a dark and sinister event while watching a concert.
